title: EventsListResponse
description: Response containing a paginated list of events from the Events Explorer

data.description: List of event objects matching the search criteria

links.description: Pagination links for navigating through the result set

next.description: URL for the next page of results; absent if this is the last page

meta.description: Metadata about the event list response

page.description: Pagination cursor information for this response

after.description: Cursor token to pass in the next request to retrieve the next page of results

elapsed.description: Time in milliseconds taken to process the event search query

request_id.description: A unique identifier for this search request, useful for debugging

status.description: The completion status of the search request

warnings.description: List of non-fatal warning messages about the search query or results
